textByHash.9f4fa3fd4e6b61b08b463e4392ee6b2947c15e67: Looking to get across to the Auburn Valley?
textByHash.f072576434d7078658d0a0f9603a6182c212b7e3: Need a guide to get you to Quetzacalli?
textByHash.7d2f5a19b477f67a89a68314f5157e45e620fcc4: Indeed. The journey isn't too long, but I can help you avoid the dangerous stretches, letting you focus on enjoying the fresh mountain air.
textByHash.231601e5ed71e89ae6a8b0ff28655e257ae76e62: Nothing at all! So, shall we?
textByHash.c167bc2c8101da007cae12a6543a252aa9b4db30: Hello, I am a mountain guide for this historical expedition. I led the team to this summit.
textByHash.81b599f5b3ad9a4f353c3946fde3d9b0194f6dde: I don't see why not. I've not much to do while the historians are exploring.
textByHash.c43631f7a3ebc7beeb6a3114d3b8a4688ec2e0ec: I make many trips each day so whenever you'd like to travel, just speak to me here, at the Shayzien outpost, or south of the mountain.
textByHash.2c4397094a14ca9e21456e9b448bf65654c796a3: Of course. Where would you like to go?
textByHash.dbe470207b0becc777131aa209a8bc3a85cba94a: Okay. Come back if you change your mind.
